ogTitle: Mount Knowles vs Mount Kuring-Gai: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Knowles and Mount Kuring-Gai.
heading: Mount Knowles vs Mount Kuring-Gai — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Knowles, New South Wales and Mount Kuring-Gai, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Knowles has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mount Kuring-Gai (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Knowles or Mount Kuring-Gai safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Knowles has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Mount Kuring-Gai scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Knowles scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Kuring-Gai scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Knowles or Mount Kuring-Gai?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Knowles has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
